description: Evals for spec-to-plan — verifies triggering accuracy and functional behavior

evals.prompt: Generate a plan from the spec
Create a PLAN.md for the authentication feature
Turn the SPEC.md into an implementation plan with phases
evals.description: Trigger via implementation intent language — phases signal

evals.prompt: Generate a task list from the plan
evals.description: Should trigger plan-to-tasks, not spec-to-plan — downstream step

evals.prompt: Design the UI from the spec
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-design, not spec-to-plan — design step
